mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_type AS tenantType, t.code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, t.owner_id AS tenantOwnerId, t.parent_id AS parentId, parent_t.code AS parentGroupCode, t.expiration_date AS expirationDate, t.status AS tenantStatus FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND TRIM(t.code) <> '' ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.code ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_type AS tenantType, t.code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, t.owner_id AS tenantOwnerId, t.parent_id AS parentId, parent_t.code AS parentGroupCode, t.expiration_date AS expirationDate, t.status AS tenantStatus FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' INNER JOIN user_tenant_access uta ON uta.tenant_id = t.id INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = uta.user_id WHERE u.id = #{adminId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND TRIM(t.code) <> '' ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.code ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_type AS tenantType, t.code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, t.owner_id AS tenantOwnerId, t.parent_id AS parentId, parent_t.code AS parentGroupCode, t.expiration_date AS expirationDate, t.status AS tenantStatus FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' INNER JOIN account_tenant_access ata ON ata.tenant_id = t.id INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = ata.account_id WHERE a.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND TRIM(t.code) <> '' ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.code ASC, t.id ASC

SELECT o.id AS ownerPk, o.owner_code AS ownerCode, o.name AS ownerName, o.password AS ownerPassword, o.secondary_password AS ownerSecondaryPassword, o.email AS ownerEmail, o.status AS ownerStatus, o.created_by AS ownerCreatedBy, o.created_at AS ownerCreatedAt,
t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_type AS tenantType, t.code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, t.owner_id AS tenantOwnerId, t.parent_id AS parentId, t.expiration_date AS expirationDate, t.category_code AS categoryCode, t.status AS tenantStatus FROM owner o INNER JOIN tenant t ON t.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE o.id = #{ownerId} AND o.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) OR UPPER(TRIM(parent_t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) AND t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, t.id

SELECT u.id AS adminId, u.login_id AS adminLoginId, u.name AS adminName, u.password AS adminPassword, u.secondary_password AS adminSecondaryPassword, u.email AS adminEmail, u.role AS adminRole, u.permissions AS adminPermissions, u.status AS adminStatus, u.created_by AS adminCreatedBy, u.created_at AS adminCreatedAt, u.last_login AS adminLastLogin, u.read_only AS adminReadOnly,
t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_type AS tenantType, t.code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, t.owner_id AS tenantOwnerId, t.parent_id AS parentId, t.expiration_date AS expirationDate, t.category_code AS categoryCode, t.status AS tenantStatus FROM user u INNER JOIN user_tenant_access uta ON uta.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN tenant t ON t.id = uta.tenant_id LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE u.id = #{adminId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) OR UPPER(TRIM(parent_t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) AND t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, t.id

SELECT a.id AS memberId, a.account_id AS memberAccountId, a.name AS memberName, a.password AS memberPassword, a.role AS memberRole, a.status AS memberStatus, a.created_source AS memberCreatedSource, a.last_login AS memberLastLogin, a.created_at AS memberCreatedAt,
t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_type AS tenantType, t.code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, t.owner_id AS tenantOwnerId, t.parent_id AS parentId, t.expiration_date AS expirationDate, t.category_code AS categoryCode, t.status AS tenantStatus FROM account a INNER JOIN account_tenant_access ata ON ata.account_id = a.id INNER JOIN tenant t ON t.id = ata.tenant_id LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE a.id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) OR UPPER(TRIM(parent_t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) AND t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, t.id

SELECT id, login_id AS loginId, name, password, secondary_password AS secondaryPassword, email, role, permissions, status, read_only AS readOnly, last_login AS lastLogin, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt FROM user WHERE UPPER(TRIM(login_id)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{loginId})) AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, owner_code AS ownerCode, name, password, secondary_password AS secondaryPassword, email, status, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt FROM owner WHERE UPPER(TRIM(owner_code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{ownerCode})) AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, account_id AS accountId, name, password, role, status, created_source AS createdSource, last_login AS lastLogin, created_at AS createdAt FROM account WHERE UPPER(TRIM(account_id)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{accountId})) AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT t.* FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) OR UPPER(TRIM(parent_t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{tenantCode})) )
SELECT secondary_password AS secondaryPassword FROM user WHERE id = #{adminId} LIMIT 1
SELECT secondary_password AS secondaryPassword FROM owner WHERE id = #{ownerId} LIMIT 1
